com.irurueta.statistics.Gamma

    • Uses of Gamma in com.irurueta.statistics

      Fields in com.irurueta.statistics declared as Gamma 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Gamma ChiSqDist.mGamma
      A gamma function instance to be reused for memory efficiency.
      Methods in com.irurueta.statistics with parameters of type Gamma 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private static double ChiSqDist.internalCdf(double x2, double nu, Gamma gamma)
      Evaluates the cumulative distribution function (c.d.f.) of a Chi-squared distribution having parameter nu.
      private static double ChiSqDist.internalInvcdf(double p, double nu, Gamma gamma)
      Evaluates the inverse cumulative distribution function of a Chi squared distribution having parameter nu.
